arts.ttl: Preview: Boavista vs. AVS - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Primeira Liga clash between Boavista and AVS, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Tomas Cosgrove gives Larne historic Conference League win over Gent
arts.sum: Larne are the first club from Northern Ireland to make it to the group stage of a European competition.
